title: Keycloak Config CLI Import Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating Keycloak realm import configuration files used by keycloak-config-cli. This schema validates all keys (rejecting unknown ones) and all value types (rejecting mismatched types).

id.description: Unique ID of the realm (auto-generated if not specified)

realm.description: Realm name (required). This is the primary identifier for the realm.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the realm

displayNameHtml.description: HTML-formatted display name shown on login pages

notBefore.description: Timestamp before which tokens are not valid

defaultSignatureAlgorithm.description: Default signature algorithm for tokens (e.g., RS256, ES256)

revokeRefreshToken.description: If true, refresh tokens are revoked after use

refreshTokenMaxReuse.description: Maximum number of times a refresh token can be reused

accessTokenLifespanForImplicitFlow.description: Access token lifespan for implicit flow in seconds

ssoSessionIdleTimeout.description: SSO session idle timeout in seconds (default: 1800)

ssoSessionMaxLifespan.description: SSO session max lifespan in seconds (default: 36000)

ssoSessionIdleTimeoutRememberMe.description: SSO session idle timeout for 'Remember Me' in seconds

ssoSessionMaxLifespanRememberMe.description: SSO session max lifespan for 'Remember Me' in seconds

offlineSessionIdleTimeout.description: Offline session idle timeout in seconds (default: 2592000)

offlineSessionMaxLifespan.description: Offline session max lifespan in seconds

clientSessionIdleTimeout.description: Client session idle timeout in seconds

clientSessionMaxLifespan.description: Client session max lifespan in seconds

clientOfflineSessionIdleTimeout.description: Client offline session idle timeout in seconds

clientOfflineSessionMaxLifespan.description: Client offline session max lifespan in seconds

accessCodeLifespan.description: Access code lifespan for authorization code flow in seconds

accessCodeLifespanUserAction.description: Access code lifespan for user actions in seconds

accessCodeLifespanLogin.description: Access code lifespan for login in seconds

actionTokenGeneratedByAdminLifespan.description: Action token lifespan when generated by admin in seconds

actionTokenGeneratedByUserLifespan.description: Action token lifespan when generated by user in seconds

oauth2DeviceCodeLifespan.description: OAuth 2.0 device code lifespan in seconds

oauth2DevicePollingInterval.description: OAuth 2.0 device polling interval in seconds

enabled.description: If true, the realm is enabled and accessible

registrationAllowed.description: If true, user registration is allowed

registrationEmailAsUsername.description: If true, email is used as username during registration

rememberMe.description: If true, 'Remember Me' functionality is enabled

verifyEmail.description: If true, users must verify their email

loginWithEmailAllowed.description: If true, users can login with email

duplicateEmailsAllowed.description: If true, duplicate emails are allowed (not recommended)

resetPasswordAllowed.description: If true, password reset functionality is enabled

editUsernameAllowed.description: If true, users can edit their username

bruteForceProtected.description: If true, brute force detection is enabled

permanentLockout.description: If true, accounts are permanently locked after brute force detection

maxTemporaryLockouts.description: Maximum number of temporary lockouts before permanent lockout

bruteForceStrategy.description: Brute force strategy: LINEAR or MULTIPLE

maxFailureWaitSeconds.description: Maximum wait time in seconds after failed login attempts

minimumQuickLoginWaitSeconds.description: Minimum wait time for quick login attempts

waitIncrementSeconds.description: Wait increment in seconds after each failed attempt

quickLoginCheckMilliSeconds.description: Time window for quick login check in milliseconds

maxDeltaTimeSeconds.description: Maximum delta time for counting failures in seconds

defaultRole.description: Default role assigned to new users

clientScopes.description: Client scope definitions for the realm

components.description: Component configurations (e.g., user federations, key providers)

browserFlow.description: Alias of the browser authentication flow

registrationFlow.description: Alias of the registration authentication flow

directGrantFlow.description: Alias of the direct grant authentication flow

resetCredentialsFlow.description: Alias of the reset credentials flow

clientAuthenticationFlow.description: Alias of the client authentication flow

dockerAuthenticationFlow.description: Alias of the Docker authentication flow

firstBrokerLoginFlow.description: Alias of the first broker login flow

defaultDefaultClientScopes.description: List of default client scope names to apply by default

defaultOptionalClientScopes.description: List of optional client scope names

eventsEnabled.description: If true, user events are enabled

adminEventsEnabled.description: If true, admin events are enabled

adminEventsDetailsEnabled.description: If true, admin event details are included

userManagedAccessAllowed.description: If true, User-Managed Access (UMA) is enabled

organizationsEnabled.description: If true, organizations feature is enabled (Keycloak 26+)

updateProfileOnInitialSocialLogin.description: DEPRECATED: Update profile on social login

requiredCredentials.description: List of required credential types (e.g., password, otp)

composite.description: If true, this is a composite role

clientRole.description: If true, this is a client role

client.description: Map of client ID to list of client role names
Client roles (key: client ID, value: list of roles)

realmRoles.description: Realm role names assigned to this group

clientRoles.description: Client role names assigned to this group

enabled.description: If true, user account is enabled

realmRoles.description: Realm role names assigned to this user

clientRoles.description: Client role names assigned to this user

temporary.description: If true, credential is temporary (user must change)

userId.description: User ID at the identity provider

consentRequired.description: If true, user consent is required

publicClient.description: If true, client is public (no secret)

logoutServiceUrl.description: Logout service URL for backchannel logout

addReadTokenRoleOnCreate.description: Add read token role on create
